notes: Small contextual Royals prospect watchlist. Keep this tight and editorial rather than mirroring every public top-30 list.

players.name: Blake Mitchell
players.watch_reason: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals.

players.name: Josh Hammond
players.watch_reason: Best position-player prospect to track in the lower minors right now.

players.name: Asbel Gonzalez
players.watch_reason: Interesting A+ outfielder and possibly the next most useful position-player follow after Hammond.

players.name: Ben Kudrna
players.watch_reason: Most relevant Omaha prospect follow; closest to MLB roster impact among this group.

players.name: Peyton Wilson
players.watch_reason: Jonathan India injury creates a practical 2B depth reason to monitor Wilson if he gets healthy.
players.status_note: Injury watch; performance may be paused until he returns.
